name: Dual Approval for Critical Autonomous
description: Tier 4 (Critical Autonomous) release requires two distinct authenticated approvals before proceeding.
rationale: Tier 4 default-deny governance: dual approval must be logged before a Critical Autonomous release. Distinctness of the two approvers is guaranteed by the governance layer.

examples.fails: Release with a single approver at Tier 4

source: FIX AI WG — Proposal on Agentic AI Runtime Governance (Healey & Houston, 12 Jun 2026); governance conditions per Szpruch, Sudjianto, Bhatti & Ang (2026), 'Scalable Runtime Governance for Agentic AI in Financial Services'.
